Scripting')"}], "description": "### Withdrawn Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it was deemed invalid. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
Multiple cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerabilities in Apache Struts 1.3.10 allow remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via (1) the name parameter to struts-examples/upload/upload-submit.do, or the message parameter to (2) `struts-cookbook/processSimple.do` or (3) `struts-cookbook/processDyna.do`.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.33937, "percentile": 0.98198}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-9848-v244-962p", "github_reviewed_at": "2022-11-03T21:09:51Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9848-v244-962p", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-9848-v244-962p"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2012-1007"}], "nvd_published_at": "2012-02-07T04:09:00Z", "published_at": "2022-05-14T02:21:24Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2012-1007", "https://exchange.xforce.ibmcloud.com/vulnerabilities/73052", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-9848-v244-962p"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "", "summary": "Withdrawn Advisory: Apache Struts XSS", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-14T13:03:56Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-9848-v244-962p", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.struts:struts-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.3.10"}, {"first_patched_version": null, "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "struts:struts"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.3.10"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-05-14T13:03:54Z"}

title: Withdrawn Advisory: Apache Struts XSS
